text: Oh, hello. Hello. Good afternoon. This is Evelyn. So, I'm calling because there are pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through Kentucky State Relief Program. So, have you received any notification about these benefits yet? No. Oh, that's all right. That's exactly why I'm calling. I want to help you get these benefits processed before they go on claim. But you're covered under both part A and part B, yes? Yes. Perfect. You qualify for the benefits. I am forwarding you to our supervisor. Please hold on. Thanks for holding your own decision.
